title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at AirAsia Cargo India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at AirAsia Cargo India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the AirAsia Cargo India family as a Distribution Manager in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About AirAsia Cargo India:
AirAsia Cargo India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AirAsia Cargo India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
